title: The Song of Beginnings
overview: Two years after moving to the city to make it big, Yohane fails another audition. Her mother tells her she's going to stop sending her money and that she should come home to find something only she can do, so Yohane returns to Numazu.

title: My Job
overview: Desperate to return to the big city, Yohane attempts to find the thing only she can do. She tries her hand at fortune telling, and gets the chance to see where her other childhood friends have found their purpose.

title: Solidarity: Are you ready?
overview: Yohane finds herself drawn further into the strange happenings interrupting life in Numazu, and learns she has a deeper connection to the soul of the town than she ever realised.

title: Between the Sky and Sea
overview: As Yohane gets closer to her childhood friends, she begins to realize what finding her special fun thing only she can do will mean. You needs some help from a friend, so Yohane heads out on yet another adventure into Numazu.

title: The Demon Lord's Secret
overview: Mari, the Demon Lord of Warshimer Island, reveals more information that might help Yohane save Numazu. Yohane realizes that Mari might need saving too, and takes it upon herself to show Mari she can be accepted in the village despite her differences.

title: The Harmony of the Shy
overview: The mystery of the Resonances deepens. Yohane and Mari get closer to Riko as they work together, but Riko has a secret that could change everything...

title: What's a Girls' Night?
overview: As the planned girls' night approaches, Yohane pushes herself to the limit to make sure it's the best experience possible for all of her new friends.

title: Reach them! Sea breeze
overview: The Numazu festival is in full swing! Yohane and her friends are excited to perform together, but disaster strikes when her magical staff goes missing. Can they find it together in time?

title: Find Lailaps
overview: Yohane is directionless after successfully singing at the festival with her friends. When Lailaps leaves without her, Yohane decides to find out what she's up to.

title: See You Soon, Yohane-chan!
overview: When an idol judge arrives in Numazu to deliver an invitation, Yohane finds herself uncertain of the path she should take.

title: Yohane's Magic
overview: As the calamity's fog lingers over Numazu, Yohane isolates herself in despair. Can her newfound friends push through and help her discover her true magic?

title: Farewell, Lailaps
overview: Evacuations begin in Numazu while Lailaps recovers at Riko's lab. When Yohane and Lailaps make their separate way to the stage within the forest, they remember the secret behind Yohane's Resonance.

title: Once Again Today
overview: The calamity has come to an end, and Yohane faces the lingering question of what she plans to do with her life.
